title: 10 more fixes — CRITICAL: inline Call button now actually rings
notes: CRITICAL FIX: Tapping the Call button in the Experts list (the primary entry point) was bypassing the call_invites pipeline + FCM push entirely. The callee never rang. Now uses the same window.__ringInStartCall path the profile-view Call button uses.
FIX: Close Friends list now actually populates on first mount (was stuck empty until you added/removed someone)
FIX: Incoming call decline now waits for the DB update + prevents accidental double-tap
FIX: Live workshop chat scroll no longer hijacks the page scroll on iOS
PERF: App.js touchstart now caches horizontal-scroll detection via WeakMap (was calling getComputedStyle on every ancestor, every tap — measurable jank on low-end Android)
FIX: Blocks loader missed notifying subscribers on cache-only path → block list could show stale until next change
FIX: Post creation with missing audience column can no longer infinite-loop on a persistent error (retry now capped at 1 attempt)
FIX: Moment composer no longer flashes broken-image icon when you swap photos quickly
FIX: Anonymous Connect skip button now correctly excludes the user you just skipped (was reading stale state, could re-match same person)
FIX: Moment users registry now notifies subscribers on error paths too (was silently leaving consumers on stale data)
